summary: The project has a well-structured frontend with good TypeScript types, UI components, and auth/cart context, but is critically incomplete on the backend side — the entire backend application code is missing. No Python files (main.py, models, schemas, services, API routes, config, database, security, migrations) are provided, making the application completely non-functional. Several frontend pages and the router are also missing. The project cannot run with docker-compose up.
strengths: Well-organized TypeScript type definitions covering all domain entities
Good frontend component architecture with proper separation of concerns
Solid auth context implementation with JWT refresh token handling via interceptors
Reusable UI components (Button, Input, Modal, Spinner, Toast, Pagination) are well-implemented
Good form validation utilities with proper error messaging
Security-conscious nginx configuration with proper headers and CSP
Docker configuration is well-structured with health checks and proper service dependencies
Comprehensive README with clear setup instructions
.env.example has descriptive comments and warns about changing default secrets
CI/CD pipeline is well-designed with proper test database setup
Cart context with proper state management and API integration
remaining_issues: CRITICAL: Entire backend is missing — no Python files whatsoever (main.py, models, schemas, services, API routes, config, database.py, security.py, alembic migrations, tests)
CRITICAL: Missing frontend router/index.tsx — app cannot route to any pages
Missing pages: RegisterPage, ProductsPage, ProductDetailPage, CartPage, CheckoutPage, OrdersPage, OrderDetailPage, ProfilePage, NotFoundPage
CartContext is defined but never wrapped in App.tsx — CartProvider is not in the component tree
CartItem component references item.product.name/price/image_url/stock_quantity but the CartItem type has flat fields (product_name, product_price, etc.) — type mismatch will cause runtime errors
OrderDetail component references order.shipping_address.street and order.shipping_cost which don't exist on the Order type
HomePage wraps itself in Layout, but the plan shows Layout wrapping via router Outlet — potential double header/footer
No package-lock.json provided — npm ci will fail in Docker build
docker-compose mounts ./backend:/app as volume which would overwrite installed dependencies in container
Frontend build will fail due to missing router module import and TypeScript strict mode catching unused/missing references
No alembic migration files or env.py provided
No seed data for initial categories/products
